params.name: Best Team Award
params.description: This seemingly resplendent trophy is a precious custom creation by the development team. Despite a few remnants of plastic hues from maintenance on its surface, the inscription on its base still represents its exceptional value: "Presented to the world's most diligent conscientious and dedicated game development team!" For trophy customization services please contact 1034-3503-789.
